title: Sign in to Qesto
subtitle: We'll email you a one-time sign-in link.
errorInvalid: That sign-in link was invalid. Please request a new one.
errorExpired: Your sign-in link has expired or was already used. Request a new one below.
emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
successMessage: We've sent a sign-in link to {email}. It expires in 24 hours.
successHint: Didn't receive it? Check your spam folder or try again.
